mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.full_name AS name, u.student_no AS studentId, u.email, o.org_name AS department, u.violation_count AS violationCount, u.account_status AS status, u.created_at AS createdAt FROM users u LEFT JOIN organizations o ON o.id = u.primary_organization_id WHERE u.user_type = 'student' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (u.full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.search}, '%') OR u.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.search}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.search}, '%'))
AND u.account_status = #{q.status}
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC

SELECT u.id, u.full_name AS name, u.student_no AS studentId, u.email, o.org_name AS department, u.violation_count AS violationCount, u.account_status AS status, u.created_at AS createdAt FROM users u LEFT JOIN organizations o ON o.id = u.primary_organization_id WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT u.id, u.full_name AS name, u.email, r.id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, u.account_status AS status, u.last_login_at AS lastLogin, u.created_at AS createdAt FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON ur.user_id = u.id AND ur.is_primary = 1 LEFT JOIN roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE u.user_type IN ('staff', 'mixed') AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (u.full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.search}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.search}, '%'))
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
